- [x] Customize the Project.
- [x] Install Required Extensions (none).
- [x] Compile the Project (npm build + lint).
- [ ] Create and Run Task (optional).
- [ ] Launch the Project (npm run dev).
- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete.
